description: This engaging template is the perfect way to welcome the Chinese New Year and promote your products. There is plenty of customizable space to feature discounts, products, and accessories to current and future customers to celebrate this new beginning! All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
